case_title: YIP, YUK CHING vs. CHANG, MOSES et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YIP, YUK CHING AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, MOSES DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHANG, MOSES
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CHANG, MOSES
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF YIP, YUK CHING

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YIP, YUK CHING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-28-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON OCT-05-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PL. PRESENT W/DAVID MENDEZ AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT W/CURTICE LAWRENCE AS COUN- SEL. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL - RSETITUTION OF PREMISES AT 75 SPRINGFIELD DR, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 10-31-93, 5PM - ALL RENT & DAMAGES WVD. - EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR OWN ATTY FEES & COSTS PL. TO PAY $750 TO DEF. ATTY. ON 10-15-93 WHICH WILL BE HELD IN TRUST PENDING THE DEF'S VACATING THE PREMISES - $750 SEC- URITY DEPOSIT WILL BE DISPERSED IN ACCORDANCE WITH S.F. RENT LAW - EACH SIDE GIVES A MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS ARISING FROM THIS ACTION - UPON DEF. SATISFYING THIS JUDGMENT, THE PL. WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISM THE ACTION. PL ATTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANG, MOSES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 75 SPRINGFIELD DR, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL OCT-31-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, BY 10-15-93 PL. WILL PAY $750 MOVING EXPENSES TO DEF. ATTY. TO BE HELD IN TRUST UNTIL DEF. MOVES 10-31-93. IF DEF.DOES NOT UPHOLD TERMS OF STIP TO BE RETURNED TO PL. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE DETAILS OF JUDGMENT.
